details.label: Weather
details.value: Welcome to Rome! You can expect warm, sunny weather—usually around 28–34°C in the day—with lovely evenings. Light clothes and plenty of water are definitely recommended.

details.label: Parking
details.value: There’s plenty of free parking close to the entrance of the venue.

details.label: Accessibility
details.value: Yes! We’ll have a buggy available for anyone who needs a hand getting around the grounds.
